jobs.title: AI / Agent Engineer
jobs.description: About MixWork & Our Client MixWork is the premier HR outsourcing partner for strategic workforce solutions, empowering brands and global organizations with skilled, dedicated, and professional top-tier regional teams from South East Asia to accelerate their business growth. On behalf of our client, a premier, household-name retail enterprise headquartered in Singapore with a well-established international footprint and a heritage of quality and operational excellence, we are seeking a dedicated professional to join their team as they actively modernize their omni-channel capabilities and leverage a sophisticated regional technology footprint to expand their enterprise AI ecosystem, building intelligent agent solutions, scalable AI platforms, and integrated data intelligence capabilities across their retail operations. Role Summary Own the client’s AI and agentic platform, built on Amazon Bedrock + Claude, as the primary platform. The client operates a hybrid AI architecture: AWS Bedrock handles the data intelligence layer (conversational agents, analytics, MCP servers, Claude Cowork integration, customer-facing AI), while Azure AI capabilities embedded in D365 and Power Platform (Copilot Studio, AI Builder, D365 Copilot) handle enterprise process automation and are delivered by client’s Microsoft implementation partner. The AI/Agent Engineer owns the AWS platform fully and is responsible for integrating outputs and data flows between the AWS and Azure AI layers. Key Responsibilities Own and operate all Amazon Bedrock agents: the Operations Agent (store floor product and brand knowledge), the Org-Wide Q&A Chatbot (live data queries across both MCPs), and the Scheduled Email Reporting Agent (automated daily/weekly analytics briefs via Amazon SES). Own and maintain both MCP servers: the Data Query MCP (natural language → SQL → Athena Gold views, read-only, governed access) and the Knowledge Base MCP (RAG retrieval from Bedrock Knowledge Base over ops documents and Gold layer data). Maintain the Bedrock Knowledge Base: Aurora Serverless v2 + pgvector, knowledge sync cadence, S3 ops document governance, and retrieval quality. Own the Claude Cowork MCP server: OAuth endpoint exposing client’s Gold layer to Claude Cowork for management use; maintain token lifecycle and IP allowlist. Build and deploy post-ECI agents: Chat Web App (React/Next.js, Cognito SSO), Scheduled Email Reporting Agent, and Org-Wide Q&A Chatbot. Develop complex multi-agent orchestration: agents that can execute write-actions across client’s systems (D365 triggers, e-commerce updates, marketing automation) with appropriate approval gates. Build customer-facing agents: AI shopping assistant and loyalty concierge on the e-commerce storefront, in collaboration with the Shopify Plus Developer. Integrate Azure AI outputs into the AWS platform: design and implement the data and event flows that connect Azure AI outputs to the AWS Gold layer, CDP, and Bedrock agents. Maintain Terraform infrastructure-as-code for the AI platform; manage ECS Fargate services; optimise Bedrock token costs and AgentCore Runtime. Shadow CloudMile during ECI build; produce client’s internal AI platform runbooks before handover. Required Qualifications & Experience Minimum 2-3 years of software engineering experience, including at least 2 years of dedicated ML/AI experience (specifically building RAG/company brain systems). Demonstrable hands-on production experience with Amazon Bedrock (Agents, Knowledge Base, Guardrails) as the primary requirement. Strong Python: Lambda development, API client development, prompt engineering, structured LLM output parsing. Experience building and deploying containerised applications (Docker, ECS Fargate or equivalent). English proficiency at B2 minimum (IELTS 6.0); mandatory assessment at interview. Demonstrated independence on complex, open-ended technical problems: able to debug agent reasoning failures, design agent topologies from requirements, and deliver working systems without architectural hand-holding. Technical Proficiency Amazon Bedrock: Agents, Knowledge Base (Aurora pgvector), Guardrails, cross-region inference profiles, AgentCore Runtime. MCP (Model Context Protocol): building MCP servers as Lambda + Function URL; tool definition; OAuth authentication. AWS: Lambda, EventBridge, SES, ECS Fargate, ALB, CloudFront, S3, Amazon Cognito, WAF. React or Next.js: sufficient to own and extend the Chat Web App and contribute to the Mobile PWA. Amazon Athena: able to write and validate SQL for MCP query generation. Terraform: read, modify, and apply infrastructure-as-code for the AI platform. Azure AI awareness (working knowledge, not build-and-own): Microsoft Copilot Studio, Azure OpenAI Service, Power Automate AI Builder, and D365 Copilot. Nice to Have AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty. Bedrock Intelligent Prompt Routing. Agentic frameworks: LangGraph, AutoGen, or CrewAI. Customer-facing AI integration on e-commerce platforms. Hands-on experience with Microsoft Copilot Studio or Azure AI Foundry. Experience with third-party vendor coordination and strong English communication skills. Statutory Provisions & Compliance Full Legal Compliance: Official employment contract managed under MixWork Indonesia, ensuring complete adherence to local labor laws and employment standards. Healthcare & Social Security: Full registration and contributions for both BPJS Kesehatan and BPJS Ketenagakerjaan to ensure comprehensive coverage. Religious Holiday Allowance: Guaranteed annual mandatory Religious Holiday Allowance (THR) paid in accordance with statutory government regulations. What We Offer Flexible Medical Benefit: Comprehensive healthcare coverage fully inclusive of dental, optical, outpatient care, and wellness treatments to support your overall well-being. Daily Allowances: Competitive transportation and meal allowances to support your operational needs. Workstation Provisioning: High-performance corporate laptop and necessary technical equipment provided. Regional Ecosystem: Access to ongoing global corporate alignment, dedicated HR support, and a stable, creative career trajectory with a premier international brand. Important Notes Language Requirement: As this is an international role, please note that all screenings and interviews will be conducted exclusively in English. Equal Opportunity Employer: MixWork is committed to creating an inclusive, diverse, and fair workplace culture. We value talent and capability above all else, completely free from discrimination or bias.

Own the AI architecture and integrate hybrid data.", "content2": "

About MixWork & Our Client

MixWork is the premier HR outsourcing partner for strategic workforce solutions, empowering brands and global organizations with skilled, dedicated, and professional top-tier regional teams from South East Asia to accelerate their business growth. On behalf of our client, a premier, household-name retail enterprise headquartered in Singapore with a well-established international footprint and a heritage of quality and operational excellence, we are seeking a dedicated professional to join their team as they actively modernize their omni-channel capabilities and leverage a sophisticated regional technology footprint to expand their enterprise AI ecosystem, building intelligent agent solutions, scalable AI platforms, and integrated data intelligence capabilities across their retail operations.

Role Summary

Own the client’s AI and agentic platform, built on Amazon Bedrock + Claude, as the primary platform. The client operates a hybrid AI architecture: AWS Bedrock handles the data intelligence layer (conversational agents, analytics, MCP servers, Claude Cowork integration, customer-facing AI), while Azure AI capabilities embedded in D365 and Power Platform (Copilot Studio, AI Builder, D365 Copilot) handle enterprise process automation and are delivered by client’s Microsoft implementation partner. The AI/Agent Engineer owns the AWS platform fully and is responsible for integrating outputs and data flows between the AWS and Azure AI layers.

Key Responsibilities

  • Own and operate all Amazon Bedrock agents: the Operations Agent (store floor product and brand knowledge), the Org-Wide Q&A Chatbot (live data queries across both MCPs), and the Scheduled Email Reporting Agent (automated daily/weekly analytics briefs via Amazon SES).

  • Own and maintain both MCP servers: the Data Query MCP (natural language → SQL → Athena Gold views, read-only, governed access) and the Knowledge Base MCP (RAG retrieval from Bedrock Knowledge Base over ops documents and Gold layer data).

  • Maintain the Bedrock Knowledge Base: Aurora Serverless v2 + pgvector, knowledge sync cadence, S3 ops document governance, and retrieval quality.

  • Own the Claude Cowork MCP server: OAuth endpoint exposing client’s Gold layer to Claude Cowork for management use; maintain token lifecycle and IP allowlist.

  • Build and deploy post-ECI agents: Chat Web App (React/Next.js, Cognito SSO), Scheduled Email Reporting Agent, and Org-Wide Q&A Chatbot.

  • Develop complex multi-agent orchestration: agents that can execute write-actions across client’s systems (D365 triggers, e-commerce updates, marketing automation) with appropriate approval gates.

  • Build customer-facing agents: AI shopping assistant and loyalty concierge on the e-commerce storefront, in collaboration with the Shopify Plus Developer.

  • Integrate Azure AI outputs into the AWS platform: design and implement the data and event flows that connect Azure AI outputs to the AWS Gold layer, CDP, and Bedrock agents.

  • Maintain Terraform infrastructure-as-code for the AI platform; manage ECS Fargate services; optimise Bedrock token costs and AgentCore Runtime.

  • Shadow CloudMile during ECI build; produce client’s internal AI platform runbooks before handover.

Required Qualifications & Experience

  • Minimum 2-3 years of software engineering experience, including at least 2 years of dedicated ML/AI experience (specifically building RAG/company brain systems).

  • Demonstrable hands-on production experience with Amazon Bedrock (Agents, Knowledge Base, Guardrails) as the primary requirement.

  • Strong Python: Lambda development, API client development, prompt engineering, structured LLM output parsing.

  • Experience building and deploying containerised applications (Docker, ECS Fargate or equivalent).

  • English proficiency at B2 minimum (IELTS 6.0); mandatory assessment at interview.

  • Demonstrated independence on complex, open-ended technical problems: able to debug agent reasoning failures, design agent topologies from requirements, and deliver working systems without architectural hand-holding.

Technical Proficiency

  • Amazon Bedrock: Agents, Knowledge Base (Aurora pgvector), Guardrails, cross-region inference profiles, AgentCore Runtime.

  • MCP (Model Context Protocol): building MCP servers as Lambda + Function URL; tool definition; OAuth authentication.

  • AWS: Lambda, EventBridge, SES, ECS Fargate, ALB, CloudFront, S3, Amazon Cognito, WAF.

  • React or Next.js: sufficient to own and extend the Chat Web App and contribute to the Mobile PWA.

  • Amazon Athena: able to write and validate SQL for MCP query generation.

  • Terraform: read, modify, and apply infrastructure-as-code for the AI platform.

  • Azure AI awareness (working knowledge, not build-and-own): Microsoft Copilot Studio, Azure OpenAI Service, Power Automate AI Builder, and D365 Copilot.

Nice to Have

  • AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty.

  • Bedrock Intelligent Prompt Routing.

  • Agentic frameworks: LangGraph, AutoGen, or CrewAI.

  • Customer-facing AI integration on e-commerce platforms.

  • Hands-on experience with Microsoft Copilot Studio or Azure AI Foundry.

  • Experience with third-party vendor coordination and strong English communication skills.

Statutory Provisions & Compliance

  • Full Legal Compliance: Official employment contract managed under MixWork Indonesia, ensuring complete adherence to local labor laws and employment standards.

  • Healthcare & Social Security: Full registration and contributions for both BPJS Kesehatan and BPJS Ketenagakerjaan to ensure comprehensive coverage.

  • Religious Holiday Allowance: Guaranteed annual mandatory Religious Holiday Allowance (THR) paid in accordance with statutory government regulations.

What We Offer

  • Flexible Medical Benefit: Comprehensive healthcare coverage fully inclusive of dental, optical, outpatient care, and wellness treatments to support your overall well-being.

  • Daily Allowances: Competitive transportation and meal allowances to support your operational needs.

  • Workstation Provisioning: High-performance corporate laptop and necessary technical equipment provided.

  • Regional Ecosystem: Access to ongoing global corporate alignment, dedicated HR support, and a stable, creative career trajectory with a premier international brand.

Important Notes

  • Language Requirement: As this is an international role, please note that all screenings and interviews will be conducted exclusively in English.

  • Equal Opportunity Employer: MixWork is committed to creating an inclusive, diverse, and fair workplace culture. We value talent and capability above all else, completely free from discrimination or bias.

jobs.title: Design Consultant
jobs.description: Kualifikasi Pendidikan minimal D3/S1 Desain Interior, Arsitektur, atau jurusan terkait. Fresh graduate dipersilakan melamar. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik dan percaya diri dalam berinteraksi dengan calon klien. Teliti, bertanggung jawab, memiliki inisiatif, serta mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim. Memiliki laptop pribadi dengan spesifikasi yang memadai untuk kebutuhan desain dan rendering. Bersedia melakukan survei lokasi, pengukuran lapangan, dan menghadiri meeting dengan klien apabila diperlukan. Memiliki pengalaman maksimal 1 tahun di bidang desain interior menjadi nilai tambah. Menguasai software desain dan rendering menjadi nilai tambah. Memiliki portofolio desain menjadi nilai tambah. Tanggung Jawab Membalas chat, melakukan konsultasi, serta membangun komunikasi yang baik dengan calon konsumen. Memahami kebutuhan klien dan menyusun konsep desain yang sesuai dengan fungsi, anggaran, dan preferensi klien. Membuat konsep desain, moodboard, serta visualisasi desain sebagai bahan presentasi kepada klien. Menyusun penawaran harga ( quotation ) proyek berdasarkan kebutuhan pekerjaan. Melakukan survei lokasi untuk pengukuran dan analisis kondisi eksisting proyek. Berkoordinasi dengan tim selama proses desain hingga persiapan pelaksanaan proyek. Membantu memastikan seluruh dokumen desain dan spesifikasi proyek tersusun dengan baik. Menjaga kualitas pelayanan kepada klien sesuai standar POJAHOME. Yang Kami Tawarkan Sistem kerja kontrak dengan waktu kerja yang fleksibel. Komisi project Kesempatan terlibat dalam berbagai proyek desain interior hunian maupun komersial. Pengalaman bekerja langsung dengan klien dan proyek nyata. Lingkungan kerja yang kolaboratif, kreatif, dan mendukung pengembangan kemampuan profesional. Kesempatan memperluas portofolio serta meningkatkan pengalaman di industri desain interior.

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Prudential Obligations EMEA, 12 month fixed term contract
jobs.description: Additional office locations London Job ID 23069 Date 10-Jul-2026 Fixed term, Mid-level Job category Risk Management As a Senior Manager in the Aggregate Risk and Prudential team within the Risk Management Group, you will play a key role in enhancing prudential risk oversight across Macquarie’s regulated entities in Europe. Working closely with and supporting the Head of Risk and Risk Officer of our France-based investment firm, you will help shape risk appetite frameworks, governance processes and strategic risk discussions, while delivering critical prudential risk assessments and regulatory outcomes. Through collaboration with senior stakeholders across Macquarie Capital, Macquarie Asset Management and Commodities and Global Markets, you will provide practical guidance on regulatory capital matters, review new business initiatives, and apply sound risk judgement to support effective decision-making and regulatory compliance across the region. While Macquarie offers hybrid working for many of our roles, this role does require three days a week in our advertised location. As a Senior Manager in the Aggregate Risk and Prudential team within the Risk Management Group, you will play a key role in enhancing prudential risk oversight across Macquarie’s regulated entities in Europe. Working closely with and supporting the Head of Risk and Risk Officer of our France-based investment firm, you will help shape risk appetite frameworks, governance processes and strategic risk discussions, while delivering critical prudential risk assessments and regulatory outcomes. Through collaboration with senior stakeholders across Macquarie Capital, Macquarie Asset Management and Commodities and Global Markets, you will provide practical guidance on regulatory capital matters, review new business initiatives, and apply sound risk judgement to support effective decision-making and regulatory compliance across the region. While Macquarie offers hybrid working for many of our roles, this role does require three days a week in our advertised location.

jobs.title: Raffles Butler
jobs.description: Company Description The Birthplace of stories and legends since 1887, Raffles is a legendary brand, steeped in history and loved by generations past, present and future. Raffles, at distinguished landmark addresses around the world, is the vibrant heart of its destination, curating experiences that are culturally enriching, intellectually stimulating and always respectful of local communities, heritage and the environment. Set above Jimbaran Bay, Raffles Bali is a place of quiet grace where nature, space and service come together with ease. Spanning 23 hectares, with more than half preserved as greenery, the resort offers both ocean views and lush landscapes, a balance of openness and tranquillity. Recognised with many international awards, it is celebrated for its design, wellbeing philosophy and thoughtful service. Conveniently close to the airport and supported by an onsite heliport, the resort remains serene and secluded. Each of the 32 villas features a private pool and garden, shaped for light, breeze and calm. Guided by the Raffles Butlers, experiences unfold gently, from the Botanical Tour and Birds and Butterflies Watching to cultural activities that reflect the island’s heritage. Here, time softens and every gesture is crafted with care, an invitation to experience Bali through the enduring grace of Raffles. At Raffles, we want to bring out your highest potential. Shortly after applying, you will receive an email from our partner AssessFirst prompting you to create a profile and complete a questionnaire. This is a mandatory step for your candidacy to be considered as it enables us to explore your compatibility with this role and our culture of luxury excellence. Job Description Raffles Butler holds full responsibility for managing and coordinating all guest-related activities and requests to ensure the highest level of satisfaction. As an integral part of the Front Office operation, the role ensures that service and product quality standards are consistently upheld. Raffles Butler provides personalized, anticipatory, and seamless experiences for VIP, suite, and high-profile guests, delivering exceptional service with refined etiquette, discretion, and an unwavering commitment to luxury hospitality. Primary Responsibilities G eneral Duties Communicate and assist guest starting from reservation, check in, during stay until departure from the resort. All communication must be done in a well manner and in professional level. Ensure highest level of guest satisfaction at all times by delivering the best service experience at every stage of the guest stay. Work in conjunction with Housekeeping and Engineering team to ensure that villas are in immaculate condition at all times and especially in preparation for guest arrival. Daily communication with Housekeeping and Food and Beverage team in relation to the needs of current and arriving guests to the resort. Oversee the cleaning and maintenance of villas by Housekeeping and Engineering staff to ensure guests are not disturbed unnecessarily. To promote in house facilities to guest during stay before giving recommendation for outside of the resort. Handle all flights confirmations, dinner reservations, tour arrangements and any other guest itinerary during stay. Assist other department whenever there is anything related to guest in the resort to ensure guest needs are handled in a timely and professional manner. Work closely with Food and Beverage team at each dining experience to ensure guest receives a consistent level of service including to cater for guest preferences accordingly. Keep all information updated by being aware of everything that is happening in the resort in all sections. Assist with training of other departments whenever it is necessary. To perform any other duty as directed by superior G eneral Responsibilities Maintain high score on guest satisfaction at all time. Responsible for the elaboration and implementation of standards related to SOP and LQA. Schedule and regularly conducts routine inspections of areas under his control. Checks all Front Office equipment including buggy and hotel vehicle, making sure they are in clean and in good working conditions, follow up on equipment that need repair, additional spare parts, replacement or disposal. Co-operates with the Purchasing department in locating sources for needed items, substitutes locally available for imported ones and ensure best quality and value for money. Controls costs by minimizing/decreasing chances of property damage, maintaining adequate inventory of items including stationeries and collaterals. Qualifications Knowledge and Experience Minimum Diploma in Hospitality Minimum of one year relevant experience in Front Office Butler knowledge and knowledge of local regulations related to Hotel Operation is a must Butler certification from an accredited institution is essential. Experience in luxury environment will be a plus Proficient in spoken and written English; additional languages are a plus (e.g., Mandarin, Korean) Competencies In-depth knowledge of hotel property management system, system monitoring of guest request and other related system in the resort operation Good communication skills, capable of functioning well under stress and during emergencies, strong interpersonal and negotiation skills Additional Information Join our team and enjoy a range of exclusive colleague perks, including complimentary upgrades, extended stays, discounted stays across Fairmont & Raffles properties , special dining and wellness discounts, and added luxuries to enhance your experience. We believe in taking care of our team, ensuring that your hard work is rewarded with exceptional benefits. Our Values Respect: We value the needs, ideas and individuality of others. We treat everyone with fairness and dignity. Excellence: We make genuine connections, and we cherish every opportunity to make the people around us feel special.​ Belonging: We celebrate our differences. We support each other and we always stand together.​ Empowerment: We have authority to take initiative and anticipate moments that create unforgettable experiences. ​ Integrity: We build trust through mutual respect and being authentic.​ Diversity & Inclusion Raffles is committed to creating an inclusive environment where diverse talent thrives. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds to join our team.

Shortly after applying, you will receive an email from our partner AssessFirst prompting...", "content2": "

Company Description


The Birthplace of stories and legends since 1887, Raffles is a legendary brand, steeped in history and loved by generations past, present and future.  Raffles, at distinguished landmark addresses around the world, is the vibrant heart of its destination, curating experiences that are culturally enriching, intellectually stimulating and always respectful of local communities, heritage and the environment. 

Set above Jimbaran Bay, Raffles Bali is a place of quiet grace where nature, space and service come together with ease. Spanning 23 hectares, with more than half preserved as greenery, the resort offers both ocean views and lush landscapes, a balance of openness and tranquillity. Recognised with many international awards, it is celebrated for its design, wellbeing philosophy and thoughtful service. Conveniently close to the airport and supported by an onsite heliport, the resort remains serene and secluded. Each of the 32 villas features a private pool and garden, shaped for light, breeze and calm. Guided by the Raffles Butlers, experiences unfold gently, from the Botanical Tour and Birds and Butterflies Watching to cultural activities that reflect the island’s heritage. Here, time softens and every gesture is crafted with care, an invitation to experience Bali through the enduring grace of Raffles.

At Raffles, we want to bring out your highest potential. Shortly after applying, you will receive an email from our partner AssessFirst prompting you to create a profile and complete a questionnaire. This is a mandatory step for your candidacy to be considered as it enables us to explore your compatibility with this role and our culture of luxury excellence.


Job Description


Raffles Butler holds full responsibility for managing and coordinating all guest-related activities and requests to ensure the highest level of satisfaction. As an integral part of the Front Office operation, the role ensures that service and product quality standards are consistently upheld. Raffles Butler provides personalized, anticipatory, and seamless experiences for VIP, suite, and high-profile guests, delivering exceptional service with refined etiquette, discretion, and an unwavering commitment to luxury hospitality.

Primary Responsibilities

General Duties

  • Communicate and assist guest starting from reservation, check in, during stay until departure from the resort. All communication must be done in a well manner and in professional level.
  • Ensure highest level of guest satisfaction at all times by delivering the best service experience at every stage of the guest stay.
  • Work in conjunction with Housekeeping and Engineering team to ensure that villas are in immaculate condition at all times and especially in preparation for guest arrival.
  • Daily communication with Housekeeping and Food and Beverage team in relation to the needs of current and arriving guests to the resort.
  • Oversee the cleaning and maintenance of villas by Housekeeping and Engineering staff to ensure guests are not disturbed unnecessarily.
  • To promote in house facilities to guest during stay before giving recommendation for outside of the resort.
  • Handle all flights confirmations, dinner reservations, tour arrangements and any other guest itinerary during stay.
  • Assist other department whenever there is anything related to guest in the resort to ensure guest needs are handled in a timely and professional manner.
  • Work closely with Food and Beverage team at each dining experience to ensure guest receives a consistent level of service including to cater for guest preferences accordingly.
  • Keep all information updated by being aware of everything that is happening in the resort in all sections.
  • Assist with training of other departments whenever it is necessary.
  • To perform any other duty as directed by superior

General Responsibilities

  • Maintain high score on guest satisfaction at all time.
  • Responsible for the elaboration and implementation of standards related to SOP and LQA.
  • Schedule and regularly conducts routine inspections of areas under his control.
  • Checks all Front Office equipment including buggy and hotel vehicle, making sure they are in clean and in good working conditions, follow up on equipment that need repair, additional spare parts, replacement or disposal.
  • Co-operates with  the  Purchasing  department  in  locating  sources  for needed items, substitutes locally available for imported ones and ensure best quality and value for money.
  • Controls   costs   by minimizing/decreasing chances of property damage,   maintaining   adequate inventory of items including stationeries and collaterals.

Qualifications


Knowledge and Experience

  • Minimum Diploma in Hospitality 
  • Minimum of one year relevant experience in Front Office
  • Butler knowledge and knowledge of local regulations related to Hotel Operation is a must
  • Butler certification from an accredited institution is essential.
  • Experience in luxury environment will be a plus
  • Proficient in spoken and written English; additional languages are a plus (e.g., Mandarin, Korean)

Competencies

  • In-depth knowledge of hotel property management system, system monitoring of guest request and other related system in the resort operation
  • Good communication skills, capable of functioning well under stress and during emergencies, strong interpersonal and negotiation skills

Additional Information


Join our team and enjoy a range of exclusive colleague perks, including complimentary upgrades, extended stays, discounted stays across Fairmont & Raffles properties, special dining and wellness discounts, and added luxuries to enhance your experience. We believe in taking care of our team, ensuring that your hard work is rewarded with exceptional benefits.

Our Values

Respect:
We value the needs, ideas and individuality of others. We treat everyone with fairness and dignity. 

Excellence:
We make genuine connections, and we cherish every opportunity to make the people around us feel special.​

Belonging:
We celebrate our differences. We support each other and we always stand together.​

Empowerment:
We have authority to take initiative and anticipate moments that create unforgettable experiences. ​

Integrity:
We build trust through mutual respect and being authentic.​

Diversity & Inclusion

Raffles is committed to creating an inclusive environment where diverse talent thrives. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds to join our team.

  1. Assisting with next day arrival pre-setup (dulang, fruit bowl, napkin + plates).

  4. Supporting buggy movement for site inspection.
  5. Assisting butler for clear up check out villas.
  6. Assisting bellman for car set up.
  7. Assisting to deliver guest’s luggage from lobby to villa if bellman is not available.

  2. Responsible for the elaboration and implementation of standards related to SOP and LQA standards.

We build trust through mutual respect and being authentic.​

jobs.title: Night Auditor
jobs.description: Company Description Join a hotel that is a member of the Accor network, whose group brings together more than 45 brands, 5,500 hotels, 10,000 restaurants and lifestyle destinations. Here, we believe in you and what you bring to the table. There are many opportunities for development and advancement. Every gesture, every smile, every action, contributes to creating a positive and memorable impact for our customers, our colleagues and also for our planet. Together, we embody the vision of responsible hospitality. Nestled in the heart of Bali, the world's favorite island destination, Novotel Bali Ubud Resort offers an unparalleled experience combining the rich Balinese cultural and artistic heritage with the natural beauty and tranquility. Job Description A Night Auditor manages a hotel’s front desk during the overnight shift while executing crucial financial closeouts. Primary duties include processing late check-ins, reconciling daily revenue and ledgers, balancing cash drawers, and running end-of-day (EOD) system reports, all while serving as the primary point of contact for overnight guest needs Qualifications Experience in a similar function for minimum 1 year Familiar with Opera Cloud Excellent communication skills Calm and service oriented Certifications in first aid and fire safety. Additional Information WHY WORK FOR ACCOR Employee benefit card offering discounted rates at Accor hotels worldwide. Develop your talent through Accor’s learning programs. Opportunity to grow within your property and across the world! Ability to contribute to the community and make a difference through our Corporate Social Responsibility and Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) activities.

jobs.title: Assistant Chief Engineering
jobs.description: Company Description Nestled in the beautiful Jimbaran Bay, in Jimbaran Hijau development area, Raffles Bali is a haven of refined seclusion, perched on a hill that offers stunning views of the ocean and its secluded beach. With only 32 ocean-view villas, each featuring its own outdoor terrace and private pool, Raffles Bali stands as one of the finest resorts in Bali, showcasing mesmerizing sunsets, lush tropical gardens, and exquisite dining experiences. Guests can indulge in our signature Bali Sling at the iconic Writers Bar, enjoy a romantic dinner in The Secret Cave and Purnama Honeymoon Bale, or rejuvenate at The Sanctuary, a hillside treatment suite, or at Raffles Spa. Our Raffles Wellbeing Butlers can arrange a variety of bespoke treatments, cultural immersions, and personalized activities, to provide the ultimate experience on the Island of the Gods. Job Description The Assistant Chief Engineer is responsible of all maintenance operations, ensuring that the physical condition of the property is maintained according to company operating and safety, and optimum guest quality standards. The incumbent will manage all engineering operations for the facilities property including electrical, refrigeration, plumbing, heating/cooling, structural, and grounds care including control and direct all vendor and company who are working to support the Engineering Department. Liaise and work alongside team of PT. Jimbaran Green Hill to conduct villa inspection and do necessary action to follow up the defect discovered. General Duties Manages and organizes a maintenance team whose mission is to ensure proper maintenance and repair of the entire building and hotel different areas and e q u i p m e n t (front and back of the house). This is accomplished within the scope of a budget and in conformity with well- defined management norms. Responsible for planning, scheduling, controlling, co-coordinating and participating in the activities of all personnel engaged in maintenance activities. Responsible for the operation of the maintenance department, overall condition and maintenance of the property, repair and up keeping of the furniture, fixtures and equipment's, installations, systems and buildings of the Hotel. Both in term of assets and respect of equipment’s. Responsible for the security and safety norms of the equipment's and the buildings. General Responsibilities Plans, controls and co-ordinates activities of all maintenance personnel engaged in maintenance and repair of the buildings and equipment's concerned (Audio Visual, M&E, Building in general and with particular attention and care to the Air conditioning systems, electrical distribution and generators, water systems, hotel systems such as Fire, kitchen equipment's, cold stores, laundry equipment's, gas storage and distribution, etc.). Responsible for the elaboration and implementation of maintenance standards. Inspect regularly the entire Hotel to check the state of the buildings and of the installations and equipment. Checks all hotel equipment making sure they are in good working conditions, follow up on equipment that need repair, additional spare parts, replacement or disposal. Sees to it that all repairs and maintenance jobs are done according to hotel standards and practices. Check regularly the state of cleanliness and hygiene and sanitation of the hotel equipment and building. Recommends points for improvement and implements the same. Conducts sanitation inspections and maintenance inspections of the back of the house on a regular basis according to hotel standards and procedures. Co-operates with the Purchasing department in locating sources for needed items, substitutes locally available for imported ones and ensure best quality and value for money. Controls costs by minimizing/decreasing chances of property damage, maintaining adequate inventory of tools. (Maintenance store control). Prepares the schedules of all maintenance colleagues, controls this schedule making sure all areas are covered properly. Follows with consistency the preventive maintenance schedule of all equipment’s in the Resort Preventive Maintenance Ensure to set up a preventive maintenance program covering all areas of the hotel. (Set up of a data base system). Set up a schedule for preventive maintenance and ensure its realization in a timely manner. Ensure that the M&E full listing is available and fully updated for a proper schedule of preventive maintenance. Directly responsible for the hotel safety and fire standards, ensure regular check, and that safety standards and emergency procedures. Liaise with project team on preventive maintenance whenever is necessary. Hotel safety and security In accordance with Indonesia laws and regulations, ensure safe usage of the fire, gas and electrical equipment and related items. Ensure that all fire equipment are in proper working condition (detection equipment's and fire-fighting equipment). Ensure regular fire drills are running in co-operation with the security department. On call 24/7 availability given the nature of the Position and Safety and Security importance towards colleagues, guests and asset. Qualifications Knowledge and Experience Bachelor Degree in Engineering Minimum of 2 years relevant experience as Assistance Chief Engineer Hotel operational experience is a must Knowledge of local regulations related to Engineering is a must Competencies In-depth working knowledge of all aspects of building systems and operations, contractual maintenance, construction and related services, and local laws and building codes pertaining to building operations and safety. Good communication and organizational skills, ability to analyze and solve problems, capable of functioning well under stress and during emergencies, strong interpersonal and negotiation skills. Demonstrated ability to manage and lead employees, experience with Talent and Cultures processes as they relate to direct reports (e.g., performance management, development, coaching, feedback, etc.) Additional Information Join our team and enjoy a range of exclusive colleague perks, including complimentary upgrades, extended stays, discounted stays across Fairmont & Raffles properties , special dining and wellness discounts, and added luxuries to enhance your experience. We believe in taking care of our team, ensuring that your hard work is rewarded with exceptional benefits. Our Values Respect: We value the needs, ideas and individuality of others. We treat everyone with fairness and dignity. Excellence: We make genuine connections, and we cherish every opportunity to make the people around us feel special.​ Belonging: We celebrate our differences. We support each other and we always stand together.​ Empowerment: We have authority to take initiative and anticipate moments that create unforgettable experiences. ​ Integrity: We build trust through mutual respect and being authentic.​ Diversity & Inclusion Raffles is committed to creating an inclusive environment where diverse talent thrives. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds to join our team.

{"id": "93258780", "title": "Assistant Chief Engineering", "teaser": "The Assistant Chief Engineer is responsible of all maintenance operations, ensuring that the physical condition of the property is maintained...", "advertiser": {"id": "60891443", "description": "AccorHotels Indonesia", "__typename": "JobSearchV6Advertiser"}, "branding": null, "companyName": "Accor", "currencyLabel": null, "employer": {"id": "3164", "name": "Accor", "companyId": "168552733771352", "companyUrl": "https://id.jobstreet.com/companies/accor-168552733771352", "__typename": "JobSearchV6Employer"}, "bulletPoints": [], "salaryLabel": "", "listingDate": {"dateTimeUtc": "2026-07-10T15:27:45.000Z", "__typename": "SeekDateTime"}, "locations": [{"label": "Kuta, Bali", "countryCode": "ID", "seoHierarchy": [{"contextualName": "Kuta Bali", "__typename": "JobSearchV6SeoHierarchy"}, {"contextualName": "Bali", "__typename": "JobSearchV6SeoHierarchy"}], "__typename": "JobSearchV6DataLocation"}], "roleId": "engineering-assistant", "tags": [{"label": "Jadilah pelamar pertama", "type": "EARLY_APPLICANT", "__typename": "JobSearchV6DataTag"}], "workArrangements": {"displayText": null, "__typename": "JobSearchV6WorkArrangements"}, "workTypes": ["Full time"], "classifications": [{"classification": {"description": "Real Estat & Properti", "__typename": "JobSearchV6ClassificationDetail"}, "__typename": "JobSearchV6Classification"}], "__typename": "JobSearchV6Data", "_details": {"job": {"sourceZone": "asia-4", "id": "93258780", "title": "Assistant Chief Engineering", "abstract": "The Assistant Chief Engineer is responsible of all maintenance operations, ensuring that the physical condition of the property is maintained...", "content2": "

Company Description


Nestled in the beautiful Jimbaran Bay, in Jimbaran Hijau development area, Raffles Bali is a haven of refined seclusion, perched on a hill that offers stunning views of the ocean and its secluded beach. With only 32 ocean-view villas, each featuring its own outdoor terrace and private pool, Raffles Bali stands as one of the finest resorts in Bali, showcasing mesmerizing sunsets, lush tropical gardens, and exquisite dining experiences. Guests can indulge in our signature Bali Sling at the iconic Writers Bar, enjoy a romantic dinner in The Secret Cave and Purnama Honeymoon Bale, or rejuvenate at The Sanctuary, a hillside treatment suite, or at Raffles Spa. Our Raffles Wellbeing Butlers can arrange a variety of bespoke treatments, cultural immersions, and personalized activities, to provide the ultimate experience on the Island of the Gods.


Job Description


The Assistant Chief Engineer is responsible of all maintenance operations, ensuring that the physical condition of the property is maintained according to company operating and safety, and optimum guest quality standards.

The incumbent will manage all engineering operations for the facilities property including electrical, refrigeration, plumbing, heating/cooling, structural, and grounds care including control and direct all vendor and company who are working to support the Engineering Department.

Liaise and work alongside team of PT. Jimbaran Green Hill to conduct villa inspection and do necessary action to follow up the defect discovered.

General Duties

  1. Manages and organizes a maintenance team whose mission is to ensure proper maintenance and repair  of the  entire  building  and hotel  different  areas   and e q u i p m e n t (front and  back  of  the  house).  This  is accomplished within  the scope of a budget and in conformity with well- defined management norms.
  1. Responsible for planning, scheduling, controlling, co-coordinating and participating in the activities of all personnel engaged in maintenance  activities.
  1. Responsible for the operation of the maintenance department, overall condition and maintenance of the property, repair and up keeping of the furniture, fixtures and equipment's, installations, systems and buildings of the Hotel. Both in term of assets and respect of equipment’s.
  1. Responsible for the security and safety norms of the equipment's and the buildings.

General Responsibilities

  1. Plans, controls and co-ordinates activities of all maintenance personnel engaged in maintenance and repair of the buildings and equipment's concerned (Audio Visual, M&E, Building in general and with particular attention and care to the Air conditioning systems, electrical distribution and generators, water systems, hotel systems such as Fire, kitchen equipment's, cold stores, laundry equipment's, gas storage and distribution, etc.).
  1. Responsible for the elaboration and implementation of maintenance standards.
  1. Inspect regularly the entire Hotel to check the state of the buildings and of the installations and equipment.
  1. Checks all hotel equipment making sure they are in good working conditions, follow up on equipment that need repair, additional spare parts, replacement or disposal.
  1. Sees to it that all repairs and maintenance jobs are done according to hotel standards and practices.
  1. Check regularly the state of cleanliness and hygiene and sanitation of the hotel equipment and building. Recommends points for improvement and implements the same.
  1. Conducts sanitation inspections and maintenance inspections of the back of the house on a regular basis according to hotel standards and procedures.
  1. Co-operates with the Purchasing department in locating  sources  for needed items, substitutes locally available for imported ones and ensure best quality and value for money.
  1. Controls costs by minimizing/decreasing chances of property damage, maintaining adequate inventory of tools. (Maintenance store control).
  1. Prepares the schedules of all maintenance colleagues, controls this schedule making sure all areas are covered properly.
  1. Follows with consistency the preventive maintenance schedule of all equipment’s in the Resort

Preventive Maintenance

  1. Ensure to set up a preventive maintenance program covering all areas of the hotel. (Set up of a data base system).
  1. Set up a schedule for preventive maintenance and ensure its realization in a timely manner.
  1. Ensure that the M&E full listing is available and fully updated for a proper schedule of preventive maintenance.
  1. Directly responsible for the hotel safety and fire standards, ensure regular check, and that safety standards and emergency procedures.
  1. Liaise with project team on preventive maintenance whenever is necessary.

Hotel safety and security

  1. In accordance with Indonesia laws and regulations, ensure safe usage of the fire, gas and electrical equipment and related items.
  1. Ensure that all fire equipment are in proper working condition (detection equipment's and fire-fighting equipment).
  1. Ensure regular fire drills are running in co-operation with the security department.
  1. On call 24/7 availability given the nature of the Position and Safety and Security importance towards colleagues, guests and asset.

Qualifications


Knowledge and Experience

  1.  
  • Bachelor Degree in Engineering
  • Minimum of 2 years relevant experience as Assistance Chief Engineer
  • Hotel operational experience is a must
  • Knowledge of local regulations related to Engineering is a must

Competencies

  •  
  • In-depth working knowledge of all aspects of building systems and operations, contractual maintenance, construction and related services, and local laws and building codes pertaining to building operations and safety.
  •  
  • Good communication and organizational skills, ability to analyze and solve problems, capable of functioning well under stress and during emergencies, strong interpersonal and negotiation skills.
  •  
  • Demonstrated ability to manage and lead employees, experience with Talent and Cultures processes as they relate to direct reports (e.g., performance management, development, coaching, feedback, etc.)

Additional Information


Join our team and enjoy a range of exclusive colleague perks, including complimentary upgrades, extended stays, discounted stays across Fairmont & Raffles properties, special dining and wellness discounts, and added luxuries to enhance your experience. We believe in taking care of our team, ensuring that your hard work is rewarded with exceptional benefits.

Our Values

Respect:
We value the needs, ideas and individuality of others. We treat everyone with fairness and dignity. 

Excellence:
We make genuine connections, and we cherish every opportunity to make the people around us feel special.​

Belonging:
We celebrate our differences. We support each other and we always stand together.​

Empowerment:
We have authority to take initiative and anticipate moments that create unforgettable experiences. ​

Integrity:
We build trust through mutual respect and being authentic.​

Diversity & Inclusion

Raffles is committed to creating an inclusive environment where diverse talent thrives. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds to join our team.

jobs.title: Director of Sales
jobs.description: Company Description Novotel Samator Surabaya Timur is conveniently located 20 minutes away by car from Juanda International Airport through the highway and close distance to the industrial area, culinary section well-known universities, shopping center, and other city attractions. Featuring 264 rooms with suites, accompanied by In Balance gym-spa & sauna, a Food Exchange restaurant, The Heritage restaurant, Parigie Coffee and Pastry, and Damsole Pool Bar offers wide National and International culinary selections for the social dining experience. The 700 sqm Grand Ballroom and 15 functional meeting rooms are available to cater to the meeting and social event needs. Large adaptable basement parking area of up to 450 cars Job Description •Prepare annual sales goals: develop working plans to carry out goals; compare actual achievements against goal; periodically take necessary corrective action. •Recommending and implementing special promotions . •Coordinating all methods to maintain and increase business volume. •Team work oriented with outstanding leadership Qualifications Fluent in English and the national language. Minimum 2 years of experience in the same position at a midscale international business hotel. Proven ability to lead and motivate teams in a dynamic and fast-paced environment. Demonstrated experience in developing and executing sales strategies to achieve revenue targets. Strong proficiency with Customer Relationship Management (CRM) systems and sales analytics tools. Proven track record of managing P&L responsibilities and controlling departmental budgets. Excellent negotiation and communication skills with the ability to build relationships with key stakeholders. Experience in designing and implementing promotional campaigns and sales initiatives. Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret sales metrics and adjust strategies accordingly. Demonstrated capability in recruiting, training, and developing high-performing sales teams.

  • Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret sales metrics and adjust strategies accordingly.
  • Demonstrated capability in recruiting, training, and developing high-performing sales teams.

jobs.title: E-Commerce Live Tiktok Specialist
jobs.description: Kesempatan Kami mencari E-Commerce Live TikTok Specialist yang berpengalaman dan kreatif untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di PT Sinar Kejayaan Online. Sebagai E-Commerce Live TikTok Specialist, Anda akan memainkan peran strategis dalam mengembangkan dan mengeksekusi kampanye penjualan langsung di platform TikTok. Anda akan bertanggung jawab untuk mengelola live streaming untuk e-commerce, meningkatkan engagement audiens, dan mendorong konversi penjualan melalui konten yang menarik dan interaktif. Posisi ini memerlukan pemahaman mendalam tentang algoritma TikTok, perilaku konsumen digital, dan tren platform media sosial terkini. Jabatan ini menawarkan peluang untuk berkembang di industri e-commerce yang dinamis dan berkontribusi langsung pada pertumbuhan bisnis perusahaan. Lokasi pekerjaan ini berada di Jakarta Barat, Jakarta Raya, dengan jenis pekerjaan fulltime. Tanggung Jawab Merencanakan, melaksanakan, dan mengelola live streaming e-commerce di TikTok dengan menghadirkan konten yang menarik, interaktif, dan menghibur untuk meningkatkan penjualan produk. Membangun dan mempertahankan engagement dengan audiens selama live session melalui komunikasi dua arah, menjawab pertanyaan pelanggan, dan menciptakan pengalaman berbelanja yang memorable. Mengembangkan strategi konten yang disesuaikan dengan target audiens dan tren TikTok terkini untuk memaksimalkan jangkauan, views, dan konversi penjualan. Menganalisis metrik performa live streaming, termasuk viewer count, engagement rate, conversion rate, dan ROI untuk mengoptimalkan strategi penjualan di masa depan. Berkolaborasi dengan tim product, marketing, dan customer service untuk memastikan keselarasan pesan brand dan kelancaran operasional live streaming. Menguasai fitur-fitur TikTok Shop dan tools e-commerce lainnya untuk memfasilitasi proses pembelian yang lancar dan meningkatkan customer experience. Mengelola inventory produk, pricing, dan promosi khusus selama live session untuk memaksimalkan penjualan. Menciptakan konten teaser dan promotional materials untuk membangun anticipation sebelum live streaming dimulai. Memantau kompetitor dan mengidentifikasi peluang baru dalam landscape e-commerce TikTok. Keterampilan, Kualifikasi, dan Pengalaman yang Dibutuhkan Minimal 2-3 tahun pengalaman dalam e-commerce live streaming, khususnya di TikTok atau platform media sosial serupa. Pemahaman mendalam tentang algoritma TikTok, fitur-fitur platform, dan best practices untuk memaksimalkan reach dan engagement. Pengalaman yang terbukti dalam mengelola live shopping events dan mencapai target penjualan melalui live streaming. Excellent communication skills dengan kemampuan untuk berbicara di depan kamera secara natural, engaging, dan persuasif. Keterampilan analytical yang kuat dengan kemampuan menggunakan tools analytics untuk tracking performance dan membuat data-driven decisions. Kreativitas dan inovasi dalam mengembangkan konten yang fresh, menarik, dan relevan dengan tren pasar. Pengetahuan tentang strategi pemasaran digital, consumer behavior, dan tren e-commerce terkini. Kemampuan multitasking dan manajemen waktu yang baik untuk menangani multiple live sessions dan deadlines. Keahlian dalam menggunakan tools editing video dan content creation basic akan menjadi nilai tambah. Diploma atau Gelar S1 dalam Marketing, Komunikasi, Bisnis, atau bidang terkait, atau pengalaman praktis yang setara. Bersertifikat atau memiliki training resmi dalam e-commerce atau digital marketing akan menjadi keuntungan. Kemampuan beradaptasi dengan cepat terhadap perubahan platform dan algoritma media sosial. Passion untuk dunia e-commerce, fashion, lifestyle, atau kategori produk yang relevan dengan bisnis perusahaan. Manfaat Utama Perusahaan Gaji yang kompetitif sesuai dengan pengalaman dan performa individu. Tunjangan kinerja dan bonus based on sales targets yang tercapai. Asuransi kesehatan komprehensif untuk karyawan dan keluarga. Program kesejahteraan karyawan termasuk tunjangan hari raya, cuti tahunan, dan cuti khusus. Peluang pengembangan karier melalui training dan workshop dalam digital marketing dan e-commerce. Environment yang dinamis, kolaboratif, dan mendukung inovasi dan kreativitas. Kesempatan untuk bekerja dengan brand dan produk yang beragam. Fleksibilitas dalam manajemen proyek dan jam kerja yang reasonable untuk keseimbangan work-life balance. Peluang untuk menjadi key person dalam tim e-commerce dengan prospek career advancement yang jelas. Tentang Kami PT Sinar Kejayaan Online adalah perusahaan yang berfokus pada pengembangan solusi e-commerce dan digital marketing di Indonesia. Kami berkomitmen untuk membantu brand dan bisnis mencapai target pasar mereka melalui strategi pemasaran digital yang inovatif dan efektif. Dengan tim profesional yang berpengalaman dan passion terhadap industri digital, kami terus berkembang menjadi partner terpercaya bagi perusahaan-perusahaan yang ingin mengakselerasi pertumbuhan bisnis mereka di era digital. PT Sinar Kejayaan Online menghargai keberagaman, inklusi, dan kolaborasi tim yang solid dalam menciptakan lingkungan kerja yang positif dan produktif. Cara Melamar Jika Anda memiliki passion untuk e-commerce dan expertise dalam TikTok live streaming, kami mengundang Anda untuk lamar sekarang . Kirimkan CV, portofolio live streaming Anda (atau link TikTok/video demo jika ada), dan surat motivasi ke tim HR kami. Kami menantikan untuk mendengar tentang bagaimana Anda dapat berkontribusi pada kesuksesan kami!

jobs.title: HRGA Support
jobs.description: Kualifikasi Pendidikan minimal S1 Psikologi, Manajemen SDM, Hukum, Manajemen, atau jurusan terkait. Memiliki pengalaman minimal 1 tahun di bidang Human Resources. Memahami administrasi HR, rekrutmen, pelatihan, dan General Affairs. Menguasai Microsoft Office (terutama Excel); pengalaman menggunakan HRIS menjadi nilai tambah. Teliti, komunikatif, dan memiliki kemampuan administrasi yang baik. Bersedia ditempatkan di Tanjung Morawa, Sumatera Utara . Job Description Mengelola administrasi HR, meliputi rekrutmen, onboarding, pelatihan, dan perubahan data karyawan. Memastikan kelengkapan dan keakuratan data serta dokumen karyawan sesuai kebijakan perusahaan. Mendukung administrasi General Affairs, termasuk dokumen audit, sertifikasi, perizinan, dan kepatuhan perusahaan. Menyusun laporan HR serta berkoordinasi dengan stakeholder internal, vendor, dan kandidat untuk mendukung operasional perusahaan.

["PENGUMUMAN :", "PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk. menghimbau agar kandidat mewaspadai penipuan bermodus rekrutmen karyawan.", "Mohon untuk diketahui bahwa PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk. tidak pernah meminta uang atau pembayaran dalam bentuk apapun dari kandidat dalam setiap tahapan rekrutmen.", "Waspadailah informasi dari alamat yang bukan milik PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk. Selalu periksa kebenaran dari informasi yang Anda peroleh ke pihak Rekrutmen PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk.", "PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo, Tbk (\"Perseroan\") berdiri pada tahun 1995. Pabrik pertama berlokasi di Blok W, Kawasan Industri Jababeka, Cikarang.", "Untuk memenuhi permintaan konsumen yang terus meningkat, Perseroan mengembangkan usahanya dengan mendirikan pabrik di Pasuruan pada tahun 2005. Besarnya permintaan masyarakat atas produk Sari Roti membuat Perseroan kembali membangun pabrik ketiga pada tahun 2008 yang juga berlokasi di Kawasan Industri Jababeka Cikarang. Kemudian disusul dengan pembangunan pabrik di Semarang, Medan dan Cikarang Barat pada tahun 2011. Pada tahun 2012, Perseroan membangun 2 pabrik baru yang berlokasi di Palembang dan Makassar. Perseroan secara resmi mencatatkan saham di Bursa Efek Indonesia dan menjual kepada publik pada tahun 2010.", "Pada tahun 2006 Perseroan mendapatkan sertifikat HACCP (Hazard Analysis Critical Control Point) yaitu sertifikat jaminan keamanan pangan sebagai bukti komitmen Perseroan dalam mengedepankan prinsip 3H (Halal, Healthy, Hygienic) pada setiap produk Sari Roti. jobs.title: Section Head GL Account
jobs.description: Kualifikasi Pendidikan minimal S1 Akuntansi, Manajemen Keuangan, atau Komputerisasi Akuntansi. Memiliki pengalaman minimal 1 tahun sebagai Supervisor di bidang Finance & Accounting. Memahami peraturan perpajakan yang berlaku. Menguasai Microsoft Excel. Menguasai software akuntansi, diutamakan ERP SAP. Bersedia ditempatkan di Tanjung Morawa, Sumatera Utara . Job Description Mengelola transaksi keuangan, pencatatan akuntansi, dan proses pembayaran melalui SAP sesuai SOP dan ketentuan perusahaan. Mengawasi proses GL, Accounts Payable, rekonsiliasi akun, serta closing bulanan. Memastikan kepatuhan terhadap perpajakan, kelengkapan dokumen, dan pengendalian internal. Menyusun laporan keuangan, analisis, serta data pendukung untuk kebutuhan manajemen, Head Office, dan audit.

jobs.title: Host Live Streaming E-Commerce
jobs.description: Kami membuka lowongan untuk Host Live Streaming yang bertugas melakukan siaran langsung di area pabrik untuk memasarkan produk wall sticker (stiker dinding dekoratif, stiker dinding marmer imitasi, wallpaper dinding) melalui platform e-commerce Indonesia seperti Shopee Live dan TikTok Live. Tanggung Jawab Utama 1. Melakukan live streaming rutin di lokasi pabrik, memperkenalkan keunggulan, bahan, ukuran, cara pemasangan dan kelebihan produk wall sticker secara detail dan menarik. 2. Berinteraksi aktif dengan penonton selama live, menjawab pertanyaan pelanggan, memberikan rekomendasi produk dan mendorong penjualan secara langsung. 3. Menyampaikan keunggulan produksi pabrik, kualitas produk dan harga kompetitif kepada calon pembeli. 4. Berkoordinasi dengan tim operasional untuk mempersiapkan produk, skenario live dan peralatan streaming sebelum siaran. 5. Mencatat feedback pelanggan selama live dan melaporkan hasil penjualan kepada tim terkait. 6. Menjaga suasana live yang ramah, energik dan profesional untuk menarik minat beli audiens. Kualifikasi & Persyaratan 1. Usia 18-35 tahun, pria/wanita. 2. Percaya diri, komunikatif, ekspresif dan memiliki kemampuan berbicara yang lancar di depan kamera. 3. Memiliki minat dan pemahaman dasar tentang produk dekorasi rumah (wall sticker/wallpaper) adalah nilai tambah. 4. Pengalaman sebagai host live streaming e-commerce (Shopee/TikTok) lebih disukai; fresh champion juga dipersilakan melamar. 5. Mampu bekerja dengan jadwal fleksibel (termasuk sore/malam hari dan akhir pekan sesuai jadwal live). 6. Bertanggung jawab, disiplin, memiliki semangat penjualan dan mampu bekerja dalam tim.

1. Melakukan live streaming rutin di lokasi pabrik, memperkenalkan keunggulan, bahan, ukuran, cara pemasangan dan kelebihan produk wall sticker secara detail dan menarik.

2. Percaya diri, komunikatif, ekspresif dan memiliki kemampuan berbicara yang lancar di depan kamera.

3. Memiliki minat dan pemahaman dasar tentang produk dekorasi rumah (wall sticker/wallpaper) adalah nilai tambah.

4. Pengalaman sebagai host live streaming e-commerce (Shopee/TikTok) lebih disukai; fresh champion juga dipersilakan melamar.

5. Mampu bekerja dengan jadwal fleksibel (termasuk sore/malam hari dan akhir pekan sesuai jadwal live).

6. Bertanggung jawab, disiplin, memiliki semangat penjualan dan mampu bekerja dalam tim.

jobs.title: Penilai Properti
jobs.description: Job Requirement: Minimal lulusan S1 di bidang Teknik Sipil, Arsitektur, Ekonomi, Manajemen, atau bidang relevan lainnya. Pengalaman minimal 1-2 tahun di bidang penilaian properti komersial. Pemahaman yang baik tentang Standar Penilaian Indonesia (SPI) dan peraturan terkait. Kemampuan analisis data properti dan penggunaan metode penilaian (pasar, biaya, pendapatan). Mampu menggunakan perangkat lunak terkait seperti Microsoft Office, AutoCAD, atau GIS. Keterampilan komunikasi dan presentasi yang baik untuk berinteraksi dengan klien. Kemampuan bekerja dalam tim dan memenuhi tenggat waktu. Ketelitian dalam pengumpulan dan analisis data. Memiliki integritas, akurasi, dan tanggung jawab tinggi dalam pekerjaan. Mampu menjaga kerahasiaan data dan informasi klien. Memiliki sertifikasi: MAPPI Job Deskripsi: Melakukan Penilaian Real Properti seperti Tanah Kosong, Rumah Tinggal, Ruko, Kantor dan Lainnya. Menggunakan pendekatan penilaian yang sesuai, seperti pendekatan pasar, biaya, atau pendapatan. Melakukan inspeksi langsung terhadap objek yang dinilai untuk memahami kondisi fisik dan teknisnya. Mendokumentasikan hasil survei dengan foto, catatan teknis, dan informasi terkait. Mengumpulkan dokumen aset, seperti bukti kepemilikan, spesifikasi teknis, dan informasi pasar. Melakukan analisis data pasar untuk menentukan estimasi nilai aset secara akurat. Menyusun laporan hasil penilaian yang memenuhi standar Standar Penilaian Indonesia (SPI) dan regulasi lainnya. Menyampaikan laporan kepada klien dan memberikan penjelasan jika diperlukan. Berkomunikasi dengan klien untuk memahami kebutuhan dan menyampaikan hasil penilaian. Berkolaborasi dengan tim penilai lain untuk memastikan validitas dan keakuratan hasil penilaian.

Job Requirement:

  1. Minimal lulusan S1 di bidang Teknik Sipil, Arsitektur, Ekonomi, Manajemen, atau bidang relevan lainnya.

  2. Pengalaman minimal 1-2 tahun di bidang penilaian properti komersial.

  3. Pemahaman yang baik tentang Standar Penilaian Indonesia (SPI) dan peraturan terkait.

  4. Kemampuan analisis data properti dan penggunaan metode penilaian (pasar, biaya, pendapatan).

  5. Mampu menggunakan perangkat lunak terkait seperti Microsoft Office, AutoCAD, atau GIS.

  6. Keterampilan komunikasi dan presentasi yang baik untuk berinteraksi dengan klien.

  7. Kemampuan bekerja dalam tim dan memenuhi tenggat waktu.

  8. Ketelitian dalam pengumpulan dan analisis data.

  9. Memiliki integritas, akurasi, dan tanggung jawab tinggi dalam pekerjaan.

  10. Mampu menjaga kerahasiaan data dan informasi klien.

  11. Memiliki sertifikasi: MAPPI


Job Deskripsi:

  1. Melakukan Penilaian Real Properti seperti Tanah Kosong, Rumah Tinggal, Ruko, Kantor dan Lainnya.

  2. Menggunakan pendekatan penilaian yang sesuai, seperti pendekatan pasar, biaya, atau pendapatan.

  3. Melakukan inspeksi langsung terhadap objek yang dinilai untuk memahami kondisi fisik dan teknisnya.

  4. Mendokumentasikan hasil survei dengan foto, catatan teknis, dan informasi terkait.

  5. Mengumpulkan dokumen aset, seperti bukti kepemilikan, spesifikasi teknis, dan informasi pasar.

  6. Melakukan analisis data pasar untuk menentukan estimasi nilai aset secara akurat.

  7. Menyusun laporan hasil penilaian yang memenuhi standar Standar Penilaian Indonesia (SPI) dan regulasi lainnya.

  8. Menyampaikan laporan kepada klien dan memberikan penjelasan jika diperlukan.

  9. Berkomunikasi dengan klien untuk memahami kebutuhan dan menyampaikan hasil penilaian.

  10. Berkolaborasi dengan tim penilai lain untuk memastikan validitas dan keakuratan hasil penilaian.

jobs.title: Trainee Terapis Perilaku Anak (Kabupaten Landak)
jobs.description: Penempatan di Landak, Kalimantan Barat. Training 1-3 Bulan di Sanggau, Kalimantan Barat. PT. Mahkota Tirta Arum adalah perusahaan yang berfokus pada layanan psikologi, terutama bagi anak-anak dan anak berkebutuhan khusus. Sejak tahun 2019, kami telah memberikan pelayanan khusus untuk kasus anak dengan kondisi seperti Autism, ADHD, dan gangguan-gangguan terkait lainnya. Kami terus berupaya untuk mendukung perkembangan emosional, sosial, dan fungsional anak-anak dalam lingkungan yang aman dan mendukung. Karena komitmen kami untuk memberikan layanan terbaik kepada masyarakat, kami sedang mencari Terapis Perilaku Anak yang berkompeten, memiliki dedikasi tinggi serta memiliki minat yang besar dalam mendampingi Anak Berkebutuhan Khusus secara optimal. Jika Anda ingin menjadi bagian dari tim kami dan berkontribusi pada perubahan positif dalam kehidupan anak-anak, PT. Mahkota Tirta Arum adalah tempat yang tepat untuk Anda. Tugas Utama: - Memberikan terapi perilaku anak dibawah supervisi Senior Terapi dan Psikolog. - Mengikuti pelatihan dan pengawasan dalam pemberian terapi perilaku pada anak. - Menjalankan program terapi perilaku yang dirancang untuk meningkatkan kemampuan sosial, emosional, dan kognitif anak. - Kerja sama dengan tim untuk memberikan dukungan dan psikoedukasi tentang mendukung perkembangan anak. - Mengelola data dan laporan terkait hasil evaluasi dan proses terapi. - Menyediakan lingkungan yang mendukung dan memastikan keamanan anak selama proses terapi. Kualifikasi: - Lokasi kantor: Kota Sanggau, Kalimantan Barat. - Pendidikan minimal: S1 Psikologi - Pengalaman kerja: Antara 1 hingga 3 tahun. (Magang saat kuliah diperbolehkan). - Keterampilan yang dibutuhkan: - Kerjasama tim (Teamwork) - Terapi Bahasa (Speech Therapy) - Analisis (Analytical Skills) - Komunikasi (Communication Skills) - Penyampaian Publik (Public Speaking) - Microsoft Word - Komunikasi (Communication) - Keterampilan Presentasi (Presentation Skills) - Manajemen Waktu (Time Management) - Administrasi Umum (Administration) Benefit : - Gaji Tetap - Tunjangan - Kost - Kendaraan (Dipinjamkan Perusahaan) PT. Mahkota Tirta Arum sangat menghargai keberagaman dan keterbukaan dalam menciptakan lingkungan kerja yang inklusif. Kami percaya bahwa setiap individu memiliki potensi yang besar dan siap untuk belajar serta berkembang bersama kami. Jika Anda tertarik dan merasa siap untuk berkontribusi dalam visi dan misi kami, silakan kirimkan lamaran anda.

jobs.title: Staff Accounting
jobs.description: Gambaran Umum Pekerjaan PT. Moristec Utama mencari seorang Staff Accounting yang berdedikasi dan terampil untuk bergabung dengan tim akuntansi kami di Batam. Sebagai Staff Accounting, Anda akan memegang peran penting dalam memastikan akurasi laporan keuangan, mengelola transaksi keuangan, dan mendukung operasi akuntansi harian perusahaan. Posisi ini memerlukan profesional yang detail-oriented, terorganisir, dan memiliki pemahaman mendalam tentang prinsip-prinsip akuntansi. Jabatan ini adalah pekerjaan kontrak yang berlokasi di Batam, Kepulauan Riau . Tanggung Jawab Utama Mencatat, memproses, dan memverifikasi transaksi keuangan dengan akurat menggunakan sistem akuntansi. Membuat dan mengelola jurnal akuntansi, termasuk posting ke buku besar umum dan rekening pembantu. Melakukan rekonsiliasi akun bank, kartu kredit, dan rekening lainnya untuk memastikan keakuratan. Mempersiapkan laporan keuangan bulanan, kuartalan, dan tahunan sesuai dengan standar akuntansi yang berlaku. Mengelola proses penggajian, termasuk perhitungan pajak dan tunjangan karyawan. Memproses faktur pembelian dan penjualan, serta memastikan kelengkapan dokumentasi. Melakukan audit internal dan pemeriksaan akuntansi untuk memastikan kepatuhan terhadap kebijakan perusahaan. Mengelola laporan pajak dan memastikan ketepatan waktu pembayaran pajak. Berkolaborasi dengan departemen lain untuk memastikan integritas data keuangan. Memberikan dukungan administrasi untuk tim akuntansi dalam berbagai tugas operasional. Keterampilan, Kualifikasi, dan Pengalaman yang Dibutuhkan Pendidikan formal: Diploma atau Sarjana (S1) di bidang Akuntansi, Keuangan, atau bidang terkait. Pengalaman minimal 2-3 tahun sebagai Staff Accounting atau posisi akuntansi sejenis di perusahaan manufaktur atau trading. Penguasaan aplikasi akuntansi seperti Accurate, atau software akuntansi lainnya. Kemampuan menggunakan Microsoft Excel dengan tingkat lanjut, termasuk pembuatan formula dan analisis data. Pemahaman mendalam tentang siklus akuntansi, jurnal, buku besar, dan laporan keuangan. Pengetahuan tentang perpajakan Indonesia (PPh, PPN, SPT) merupakan nilai tambah. Ketelitian tinggi dan perhatian terhadap detail dalam menangani data keuangan. Kemampuan komunikasi tertulis dan lisan yang baik dalam bahasa Indonesia. Integritas dan etika bisnis yang kuat dalam mengelola informasi keuangan sensitif. Kemampuan mengelola multiple tasks dan bekerja dalam tenggat waktu yang ketat. Manfaat Utama Perusahaan Upah yang kompetitif sesuai dengan pengalaman dan kualifikasi Anda. Tunjangan kesehatan yang komprehensif, termasuk asuransi kesehatan untuk karyawan. Tunjangan makan dan transportasi. Cuti tahunan yang sesuai dengan ketentuan peraturan perburuhan Indonesia. Lingkungan kerja yang profesional dan supportif dengan tim yang kolaboratif. Peluang untuk pengembangan karir dan peningkatan kompetensi melalui pelatihan internal. Kesempatan untuk bekerja dengan teknologi dan sistem akuntansi modern. Program kesejahteraan karyawan yang dirancang untuk meningkatkan kualitas hidup. Tentang PT. Moristec Utama PT. Moristec Utama adalah perusahaan yang berkomitmen untuk memberikan solusi bisnis berkualitas tinggi dengan standar profesional internasional. Dengan pengalaman bertahun-tahun di industri, kami telah membangun reputasi sebagai mitra bisnis yang terpercaya dan inovatif. Kami percaya pada pentingnya integritas, transparansi, dan akuntabilitas dalam setiap aspek operasi bisnis kami. Perusahaan kami menjunjung tinggi nilai-nilai etika bisnis dan berkomitmen untuk menciptakan lingkungan kerja yang inklusif, saling menghormati, dan mendukung pertumbuhan profesional setiap karyawan. Kami mengundang individu berbakat untuk bergabung dengan tim kami dan berkontribusi pada kesuksesan bersama. Lamar Sekarang Jika Anda memenuhi persyaratan di atas dan tertarik untuk bergabung dengan PT. Moristec Utama, kami mengundang Anda untuk lamar sekarang . Kirimkan CV, surat lamaran, dan dokumen pendukung Anda melalui portal rekrutmen kami. Kami menanti kabar dari Anda!

  3. Melakukan rekonsiliasi akun bank, kartu kredit, dan rekening lainnya untuk memastikan keakuratan.

  4. Mempersiapkan laporan keuangan bulanan, kuartalan, dan tahunan sesuai dengan standar akuntansi yang berlaku.

  5. Mengelola proses penggajian, termasuk perhitungan pajak dan tunjangan karyawan.

  6. Memproses faktur pembelian dan penjualan, serta memastikan kelengkapan dokumentasi.

  7. Melakukan audit internal dan pemeriksaan akuntansi untuk memastikan kepatuhan terhadap kebijakan perusahaan.

  8. Mengelola laporan pajak dan memastikan ketepatan waktu pembayaran pajak.

  9. Berkolaborasi dengan departemen lain untuk memastikan integritas data keuangan.

  10. Memberikan dukungan administrasi untuk tim akuntansi dalam berbagai tugas operasional.


Keterampilan, Kualifikasi, dan Pengalaman yang Dibutuhkan

  1. Pendidikan formal: Diploma atau Sarjana (S1) di bidang Akuntansi, Keuangan, atau bidang terkait.

  2. Pengalaman minimal 2-3 tahun sebagai Staff Accounting atau posisi akuntansi sejenis di perusahaan manufaktur atau trading.

  3. Penguasaan aplikasi akuntansi seperti Accurate, atau software akuntansi lainnya.

  4. Kemampuan menggunakan Microsoft Excel dengan tingkat lanjut, termasuk pembuatan formula dan analisis data.

  5. Pemahaman mendalam tentang siklus akuntansi, jurnal, buku besar, dan laporan keuangan.

  6. Pengetahuan tentang perpajakan Indonesia (PPh, PPN, SPT) merupakan nilai tambah.

  7. Ketelitian tinggi dan perhatian terhadap detail dalam menangani data keuangan.

  8. Kemampuan komunikasi tertulis dan lisan yang baik dalam bahasa Indonesia.

  9. Integritas dan etika bisnis yang kuat dalam mengelola informasi keuangan sensitif.

  10. Kemampuan mengelola multiple tasks dan bekerja dalam tenggat waktu yang ketat.


Manfaat Utama Perusahaan

  1. Upah yang kompetitif sesuai dengan pengalaman dan kualifikasi Anda.

  2. Tunjangan kesehatan yang komprehensif, termasuk asuransi kesehatan untuk karyawan.

  3. Tunjangan makan dan transportasi.

  4. Cuti tahunan yang sesuai dengan ketentuan peraturan perburuhan Indonesia.

  5. Lingkungan kerja yang profesional dan supportif dengan tim yang kolaboratif.

  6. Peluang untuk pengembangan karir dan peningkatan kompetensi melalui pelatihan internal.

  7. Kesempatan untuk bekerja dengan teknologi dan sistem akuntansi modern.

  8. Program kesejahteraan karyawan yang dirancang untuk meningkatkan kualitas hidup.


Tentang PT. Moristec Utama
PT. Moristec Utama adalah perusahaan yang berkomitmen untuk memberikan solusi bisnis berkualitas tinggi dengan standar profesional internasional. Dengan pengalaman bertahun-tahun di industri, kami telah membangun reputasi sebagai mitra bisnis yang terpercaya dan inovatif. Kami percaya pada pentingnya integritas, transparansi, dan akuntabilitas dalam setiap aspek operasi bisnis kami. Perusahaan kami menjunjung tinggi nilai-nilai etika bisnis dan berkomitmen untuk menciptakan lingkungan kerja yang inklusif, saling menghormati, dan mendukung pertumbuhan profesional setiap karyawan. Kami mengundang individu berbakat untuk bergabung dengan tim kami dan berkontribusi pada kesuksesan bersama.

Lamar Sekarang
Jika Anda memenuhi persyaratan di atas dan tertarik untuk bergabung dengan PT. Moristec Utama, kami mengundang Anda untuk lamar sekarang. Kirimkan CV, surat lamaran, dan dokumen pendukung Anda melalui portal rekrutmen kami. Kami menanti kabar dari Anda!

jobs.title: SUPERVISOR OPERASIONAL (SPV)
jobs.description: Key Responsibilities Memimpin operasional harian dan memastikan seluruh aktivitas berjalan optimal sesuai SOP Mengelola, mengarahkan, dan mengembangkan tim operasional (service, front desk, dll) Menjaga standar service excellence dan memastikan pengalaman terbaik bagi member & guest Mengontrol kesiapan area: kebersihan, kerapihan, dan kelengkapan operasional Mengatur jadwal kerja tim serta kebutuhan manpower harian Menangani komplain customer secara cepat, tepat, dan profesional Berkoordinasi lintas departemen untuk kelancaran operasional Mengawasi event, reservasi, dan aktivitas member agar berjalan lancar Menganalisis laporan operasional dan melakukan evaluasi performa tim Qualifications Minimal SMA/SMK (diutamakan Hospitality/Perhotelan) Pengalaman min. 3 tahun di operasional / hospitality / F&B Memiliki pengalaman memimpin tim (leader/SPV) Leadership kuat, komunikatif, dan mampu mengambil keputusan Berpenampilan profesional dengan attitude service excellence Mampu bekerja dalam sistem shift & lingkungan kerja dinamis Customer-oriented dengan kemampuan problem solving yang baik Nilai tambah: pengalaman di sport/lifestyle area (padel, tenis, gym, dll)

Key Responsibilities

  • Memimpin operasional harian dan memastikan seluruh aktivitas berjalan optimal sesuai SOP

  • Mengelola, mengarahkan, dan mengembangkan tim operasional (service, front desk, dll)

  • Menjaga standar service excellence dan memastikan pengalaman terbaik bagi member & guest

  • Mengontrol kesiapan area: kebersihan, kerapihan, dan kelengkapan operasional

  • Mengatur jadwal kerja tim serta kebutuhan manpower harian

  • Menangani komplain customer secara cepat, tepat, dan profesional

  • Pengalaman min. 3 tahun di operasional / hospitality / F&B

  • Memiliki pengalaman memimpin tim (leader/SPV)

  • Leadership kuat, komunikatif, dan mampu mengambil keputusan

  • Berpenampilan profesional dengan attitude service excellence

  • Mampu bekerja dalam sistem shift & lingkungan kerja dinamis

  • Customer-oriented dengan kemampuan problem solving yang baik

  • Nilai tambah: pengalaman di sport/lifestyle area (padel, tenis, gym, dll)

jobs.title: PRAMUSAJI
jobs.description: Qualification: Pendidikan minimal SMA/SMK sederajat. Memiliki pengalaman sebagai pramusaji atau food service menjadi nilai tambah. Berpenampilan rapi, bersih, dan sopan. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi dan pelayanan yang baik. Mampu bekerja secara tim maupun individu. Bersedia bekerja dengan sistem shift. Job Description: Menyiapkan dan mendistribusikan makanan serta minuman kepada pasien sesuai jadwal dan ketentuan yang berlaku. Memastikan makanan yang diberikan sesuai dengan diet dan instruksi dari Ahli Gizi. Menjaga kebersihan peralatan dan area kerja. Membantu proses penyajian makanan dengan standar kebersihan dan keamanan pangan. Berkoordinasi dengan tim gizi dan unit terkait untuk memastikan pelayanan kepada pasien berjalan dengan baik.
